🛠️ Tech Stack & Pipeline Steps

Python 3.10+Pandas NumPyScikit-learn XGBoostSHAP TextBlobFastAPI UvicornStreamlit MatplotlibSeaborn


Step Description Output
1. Data GenerationSynthetic 5,000-customer e-commerce datasetecommerce_churn.csv
2. PreprocessingImputation · Label encoding · Scaling · RFM · Engagement scoreprocessed_data.csv
3. Sentiment NLPTextBlob polarity on review_text → sentiment_score featuresentiment columns
4. EDA6 chart sets saved to reports/eda_*.png
5. Model TrainingLR · DT · RF · XGBoost + RandomizedSearchCV + 5-fold CVbest_model.pkl
6. ExplainabilitySHAP TreeExplainer summary & bar plotsshap_*.png
7. SegmentationK-Means (k=3): Loyal / At-Risk / Churnedkmeans_model.pkl
8. APIFastAPI /predict + /predict_batch with retention strategiesapi/app.py
9. Dashboard6-page Streamlit app with live prediction sliderdashboard/app.py
